task_completion.description: Log in to ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus using administrator credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus dashboard or interface with the user logged in as an administrator.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Self-Service Portal settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Self-Service Portal Settings' page open within the Admin or Setup section of the application.

task_completion.description: Set the Welcome Message to the specified text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Welcome Message text area containing exactly: 'Welcome to the Acme Global IT Portal. Please search the Solutions tab before submitting a ticket.'

task_completion.description: Disable the option to allow requesters to reopen resolved/closed requests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the checkbox or toggle for allowing requesters to reopen resolved/closed requests is unchecked or set to disabled/false.

task_completion.description: Enable the option to show request cost to the requester.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the checkbox or toggle for showing request cost to the requester is checked or set to enabled/true.
Screenshots show the agent clicking the 'Save' button or a success message/banner indicating that the settings have been saved successfully.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQL commands updating 'REOPEN_RESOLVED_REQUEST' or 'SHOW_REQ_COST' parameters.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus interface, not a text editor or a mock file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The Welcome Message must be exactly 'Welcome to the Acme Global IT Portal. Please search the Solutions tab before submitting a ticket.'. The setting to allow requesters to reopen resolved/closed requests must be disabled (false/unchecked). The setting to show request cost to the requester must be enabled (true/checked).
